title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes using Claude Code to build a product that generates $481,000 annually, going from zero code to a polished codebase in 45 days with a non-technical founder. The video covers five concrete steps for rapid development including problem definition, workflow identification, vocabulary learning, careful deployment, and fault identification.
